questionHtml: Distinguish between levels of predation in marmots born in the wild and those born in captivity.
markschemeHtml: predation was greater in those born in captivity ✔

meta.title: Distinguish between levels of predation in marmots born in the wild and those born in captivity.
breadcrumbLabels: B4.2.10. Adaptations of predators for finding, catching and killing prey and of prey animals for resisting predation
